title: better glazed terracotta
description: A resource pack that gives glazed terracotta its true color
body:
A resource pack that changes the texture of glazed terracotta so that the terracotta is the correct color (many of the vanila textures have other colors, for example the white terracotta has a lot of yellow and blue) and also reduces the appearance to be nicer.


all my packs:https://modrinth.com/user/erez43
